name: Oatmeal and Dried Fruit Cookies
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, combine all of the dry ingredients, including the dried fruit. Add the oil and buttermilk; mix well. Roll out the mixture to an 1/8-inch thickness. Use a cookie cutter to cut out 3-1/2-inch circles. Arrange on oiled cookie sheets with a spatula. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. Allow to cool on wire racks.
